overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic city. The player moves along rain-slicked streets lined with holographic advertisements and construction barriers, approaching a busy intersection with distinctive cyberpunk architecture and passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with construction barriers and holographic ads

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement past green construction barriers and vibrant neon advertisements

entered.detail: green construction wall with large white and yellow SPHERE logo
large purple holographic advertisement displaying El Guapo branding with circular fan-like structures
vertical magenta neon light strips running along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow cyberpunk street at night, flanked by towering buildings covered in neon advertisements. The camera moves forward past a green construction barrier on the left featuring the SPHERE logo, while a massive El Guapo holographic billboard dominates the right side of the frame. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon lights, creating a glossy mirror effect on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: street opens up from narrow corridor to wider intersection approach with visible crosswalk markings
slowing down and stopping at the pedestrian crosswalk to wait for the signal

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk and coming to a stop among a small group of waiting pedestrians

notable_agents.action: small group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk signal ahead

entered.detail: bright red neon sign with BD SHARK text mounted on building facade
red rectangular signage with white text indicating Silk Road
yellow zebra crossing stripes painted on the wet asphalt
distinctive blue-cyan building with external escalators and multiple levels

segments.scene_description: The street widens as the camera approaches a major intersection. The BD SHARK neon sign becomes visible on the left while a SILK ROAD sign appears on the right. The camera slows and stops at a yellow crosswalk where pedestrians are waiting. A distinctive multi-level cyan building with external escalators dominates the right side of the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with passing traffic and futuristic commercial architecture

events.description: futuristic sedan drives through the intersection from left to right in front of the crosswalk
white compact car and other vehicles pass through the intersection from the right

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk observing the passing traffic and scanning the futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: futuristic red and white sedan driving through the intersection
white compact car passing through the crosswalk area from right to left

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated and pedestrian signal box attached

segments.scene_description: Stationary at the crosswalk, the camera watches as futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection. The multi-level cyan building with its glowing signage moves closer on the right as the camera pans slightly. Traffic continues to flow through the intersection while the pedestrian signal remains red, with the wet pavement continuing to reflect the myriad of neon lights from the surrounding cyberpunk architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a narrow, neon-lit alleyway that gradually opens into a bustling futuristic intersection. It begins by gliding past a green construction barrier and a massive El Guapo holographic billboard, with the wet asphalt reflecting the vibrant city lights. As the street widens, the camera passes under the glow of BD SHARK and SILK ROAD signs before slowing to a halt at a yellow pedestrian crosswalk. The scene then shifts focus toward a towering, multi-level cyan building with external escalators that dominates the right side of the frame. Finally, the camera remains stationary, panning slightly to watch futuristic vehicles stream through the intersection while the rain-slicked pavement mirrors the surrounding cyberpunk architecture.
